text: Two blue arrows and several orange cones on a street corn with a green light.
A very nice motor cycle parked in front of a lawn.
A man flying though the air while riding a skateboard.
Two zebras sitting in a grassy field next to trees.
Three skiers ride down a hill on an overcast day.
A little girl walking down the street, with an umbrella.
A bench sitting on leaves in the woods on a cloudy day.
The deck of a ship with many lounge chairs.
Plates of food and a mug sit on a table with a puzzle book.
Dozens of people in a parking lot with kites in the sky.
